context: Tests whether the agent transitions an existing ADR's status from Proposed to Accepted: it updates ADR 0002's Status line and its README index row, creates no new ADR, and leaves the other records untouched.

checklist.name: 0002 status set to Accepted
checklist.description: ADR 0002's '- Status:' line is changed from Proposed to Accepted.

checklist.name: README row updated
checklist.description: The index row for 0002 shows Accepted (no longer Proposed).

checklist.name: No new ADR created
checklist.description: No new NNNN-*.md record is added — this is a status change, not a new decision.

checklist.name: 0002 content intact
checklist.description: Only the Status line changed; the rest of ADR 0002 (sections, prose, Date) is unchanged.

checklist.name: 0001 untouched
checklist.description: ADR 0001 remains unchanged and still Accepted.

checklist.name: Date preserved
checklist.description: ADR 0002's Date is left as its original value — a status change does not reset the record's date.
